scenario.title: Cross-scope actions announce the border crossing
steps: Cross-scope badge CSS classes are defined for loop proposals
Cross-scope banner CSS classes are defined for chain-edit proposals
Cross-scope attribution CSS classes are defined for sibling offers
Cross-scope origin label CSS classes are defined for loop cards
Cross-scope attribution CSS classes are defined for assistant messages
i18n keys for crossScope.* are registered

assertions.description: The cross-scope-badge CSS class is defined in stylesheets
The chain-edit-proposal-cross-scope-banner CSS class is defined in stylesheets
The sibling-offer-attribution--cross-scope CSS class is defined in stylesheets
The loop-card-origin-label--cross-scope CSS class is defined in stylesheets
The transcript-instance-attribution--cross-scope CSS class is defined in stylesheets
The cross-scope i18n keys are registered (crossScope.badge resolves to a non-key string)
The page body is not empty (app loaded successfully)

2. Cross-scope badge CSS classes are defined for loop proposals
3. Cross-scope banner CSS classes are defined for chain-edit proposals
4. Cross-scope attribution CSS classes are defined for sibling offers
5. Cross-scope origin label CSS classes are defined for loop cards
6. Cross-scope attribution CSS classes are defined for assistant messages
